title: Doors Invasion
description: Doors entities and items made their way into your world!
body:
## 🎃 Halloween Map!

(Roblox) Doors entities made their way into your world! Use craftable items to explore caves and protect from them!

## Featuring:

### Giggles
![Giggles hanging on the ceiling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6be61ddd762bec41fd365ef9d52b5b770b6e4d77_0.webp)

Not friendly, spawns in caves and lands on your head!

### Items!
![In game models for the Bulklight, Flashlight, Lighter, Vitamins and Crucifix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e0ded274a52b003689c13c32b988870c5de0660.png)

The Bulklight, Flashlight and the Lighter are here to help you navigate caves! And also stun giggles.

The Vitamins are here to make you run faster! Stackable up to 3.

The Crucifix let's you crucify Doors Entities or any other entity by hitting it! Costs a bit.
